title: Dayforce Content (Aligned to Endpoint Names)
description: Content schema to read and write Dayforce API data. Each top-level definition matches its Dayforce endpoint name exactly.

EmployeeXRefCode.description: External reference code for the employee. This is the unique identifier.

EmployeeNumber.description: Employment identification number assigned to an employee.

SocialSecurityNumber.description: Social Security Number of the employee.

HireDate.description: Most recent hire date of the employee.

OriginalHireDate.description: Original hire date of the employee.

EmploymentStatusXRefCode.description: Employment status xrefcode (e.g., Active, Terminated, Leave of Absence).

OrgUnitXRefCode.description: External reference code for the organizational unit.

DepartmentXRefCode.description: External reference code for the department.

JobXRefCode.description: External reference code for the job.

PositionXRefCode.description: External reference code for the position.

PayClassXRefCode.description: External reference code for the pay class.

PayGroupXRefCode.description: External reference code for the pay group.

PayPolicyXRefCode.description: External reference code for the pay policy.

PayTypeXRefCode.description: External reference code for the pay type.

PayrollPolicyXRefCode.description: External reference code for the payroll policy.

BaseSalary.description: Base salary amount for the employee.

BaseRate.description: Base hourly rate for the employee.

ManagerXRefCode.description: External reference code for the employee's manager.

IsActive.description: Indicates whether the employee is currently active.

LastUpdated.description: Date and time when the employee record was last updated.

EmployeePayAdjustments.description: Employee Pay Adjustments records in Dayforce.
EmployeePayAdjustments.title: EmployeePayAdjustments

EmployeePayAdjustXRefCode.description: Unique identifier for the Employee Pay Adjustment record.

OrgUnitXRefCode.description: External reference code for the organizational unit.

EmployeeXRefCode.description: External reference code for the employee.

PayAdjustmentCodeXRefCode.description: External reference code for the pay adjustment code.

Hours.description: Number of hours for the pay adjustment.

JobXRefCode.description: External reference code for the job.

DepartmentXRefCode.description: External reference code for the department.

PayCategoryXRefCode.description: External reference code for the pay category.

ProjectXRefCode.description: External reference code for the project.

DocketXRefCode.description: External reference code for the docket.

PieceQuantity.description: Piecework quantity associated with the adjustment.

IsPremium.description: Indicates whether the adjustment is premium pay.

IsDeleted.description: Indicates whether the pay adjustment record is deleted.

Rate.description: Rate associated with the pay adjustment.

EmployeeComment.description: Employee comment related to the pay adjustment.

ManagerComment.description: Manager comment related to the pay adjustment.

ManagerAuthorized.description: Indicates whether the manager has authorized the adjustment.

EmployeeAuthorized.description: Indicates whether the employee has authorized the adjustment.

LaborMetrics.description: Array of Labor Metrics items attached to the pay adjustment.

links.description: Get a specific Employee Pay Adjustment
links.title: Info

links.description: Create a new Employee Pay Adjustment
links.title: Create

links.description: Update an existing Employee Pay Adjustment
links.title: Update

LaborMetrics.description: Labor Metrics item for a Pay Adjustment or Punch.
LaborMetrics.title: LaborMetrics

LaborMetricsTypeXRefCode.description: External reference code for the Labor Metric type.

LaborMetricsCodeXRefCode.description: External reference code for the Labor Metric code.

MealBreaks.description: Meal Break records nested within an Employee Punch.
MealBreaks.title: MealBreaks

MealBreakType.description: Type of meal break (e.g., Unpaid, Paid).

TimeStart.description: Start time of the meal break.

TimeEnd.description: End time of the meal break.

Transfers.description: Transfer records nested within an Employee Punch, representing a mid-shift department/job/project transfer.
Transfers.title: Transfers

TimeStart.description: Start time of the transfer segment.

DeptJobXRefCode.description: External reference code combining department and job for the transfer.

OrgUnitXRefCode.description: External reference code for the organizational unit of the transfer.

PayAdjustCodeXRefCode.description: External reference code for the pay adjustment code of the transfer.

ProjectXRefCode.description: External reference code for the project of the transfer.

DocketXRefCode.description: External reference code for the docket of the transfer.

Quantity.description: Quantity associated with the docket for this transfer.

TransferLaborMetrics.description: Array of Labor Metrics items attached to the transfer.

EmployeePunches.description: Employee Punch records in Dayforce representing clock-in/clock-out time entries.
EmployeePunches.title: EmployeePunches

PunchXRefCode.description: Unique external reference code for the punch record.

EmployeeXRefCode.description: External reference code for the employee.

DeptJobXRefCode.description: External reference code combining department and job for the punch.

OrgUnitXRefCode.description: External reference code for the organizational unit associated with the punch.

PayAdjustCodeXRefCode.description: External reference code for the pay adjustment code associated with the punch.

ProjectXRefCode.description: External reference code for the project associated with the punch.

DocketXRefCode.description: External reference code for the docket associated with the punch.

Quantity.description: Quantity associated with the docket for this punch.

EmployeeAuthorized.description: Indicates whether the employee has authorized the punch.

ManagerAuthorized.description: Indicates whether the manager has authorized the punch.

PunchStatus.description: Status of the punch (e.g., Approved, Pending, Rejected).

TimeStartRaw.description: Raw (unrounded) clock-in time as recorded by the time device.

TimeEndRaw.description: Raw (unrounded) clock-out time as recorded by the time device.

NetHours.description: Net worked hours for the punch after breaks.

StartExceptionCode.description: Exception code generated at punch-in (e.g., early, late).

EndExceptionCode.description: Exception code generated at punch-out (e.g., early, late).

BusinessDate.description: Business date the punch is attributed to.

IsDeleted.description: Indicates whether the punch record has been deleted.

IsOnCall.description: Indicates whether the punch represents an on-call shift.

FuturePunch.description: Indicates whether this is a future-dated punch.

AssumedTimeStart.description: Assumed start time used when the actual punch-in is missing.

AssumedTimeEnd.description: Assumed end time used when the actual punch-out is missing.

LastModifiedTimestampUtc.description: UTC timestamp of when the punch record was last modified.

MealBreaks.description: Array of Meal Break records associated with the punch.

Transfers.description: Array of Transfer records associated with the punch representing mid-shift transfers.

PunchLaborMetrics.description: Array of Labor Metrics items attached to the punch.
Labor Metrics items attached to an Employee Punch.
PunchLaborMetrics.title: PunchLaborMetrics

LaborMetricsTypeXRefCode.description: External reference code for the Labor Metric type.

LaborMetricsCodeXRefCode.description: External reference code for the Labor Metric code.

TransferLaborMetrics.description: Labor Metrics items attached to a Transfer within an Employee Punch.
TransferLaborMetrics.title: TransferLaborMetrics

LaborMetricsTypeXRefCode.description: External reference code for the Labor Metric type.

LaborMetricsCodeXRefCode.description: External reference code for the Labor Metric code.
